channel.title: Biomedical Engineering / Biomedizinische Technik
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Biomedical Engineering / Biomedizinische Technik

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Jonas Roth, Verena Voigt, Okan Yilmaz, Michael Schauwinhold, Michael Czaplik, Andreas Follmann, Carina B. Pereira DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bmt-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Change of publication model for Biomedical Engineering/Biomedizinische Technik
item.description: Article by Jonas Roth, Verena Voigt, Okan Yilmaz, Michael Schauwinhold, Michael Czaplik, Andreas Follmann, Carina B. Pereira DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bmt-2024-0601

item.title: Mechano-responses of quadriceps muscles evoked by transcranial magnetic stimulation
item.description: Article by Jonas Roth, Verena Voigt, Okan Yilmaz, Michael Schauwinhold, Michael Czaplik, Andreas Follmann, Carina B. Pereira DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bmt-2023-0501

item.title: A type-2 fuzzy inference-based approach enables walking speed estimation that adapts to inter-individual gait patterns
item.description: Article by Jonas Roth, Verena Voigt, Okan Yilmaz, Michael Schauwinhold, Michael Czaplik, Andreas Follmann, Carina B. Pereira DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bmt-2024-0230

item.title: DeepCOVIDNet-CXR: deep learning strategies for identifying COVID-19 on enhanced chest X-rays
item.description: Article by Jonas Roth, Verena Voigt, Okan Yilmaz, Michael Schauwinhold, Michael Czaplik, Andreas Follmann, Carina B. Pereira DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bmt-2021-0272

item.title: Prediction of muscular-invasive bladder cancer using multi-view fusion self-distillation model based on 3D T2-Weighted images
item.description: Article by Jonas Roth, Verena Voigt, Okan Yilmaz, Michael Schauwinhold, Michael Czaplik, Andreas Follmann, Carina B. Pereira DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bmt-2024-0333

item.title: Evaluation of the RF depositions at 3T in routine clinical scans with respect to the SAR safety to improve efficiency of MRI utilization
item.description: Article by Jonas Roth, Verena Voigt, Okan Yilmaz, Michael Schauwinhold, Michael Czaplik, Andreas Follmann, Carina B. Pereira DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bmt-2024-0339

item.title: A software tool for fabricating phantoms mimicking human tissues with designated dielectric properties and frequency
item.description: Article by Jonas Roth, Verena Voigt, Okan Yilmaz, Michael Schauwinhold, Michael Czaplik, Andreas Follmann, Carina B. Pereira DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bmt-2024-0043

item.title: MedShapeNet – a large-scale dataset of 3D medical shapes for computer vision
item.description: Article by Jonas Roth, Verena Voigt, Okan Yilmaz, Michael Schauwinhold, Michael Czaplik, Andreas Follmann, Carina B. Pereira DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bmt-2024-0396

item.title: Concept and development of a telemedical supervision system for anesthesiology in operating rooms using the interoperable communication standard ISO/IEEE 11073 SDC
item.description: Article by Jonas Roth, Verena Voigt, Okan Yilmaz, Michael Schauwinhold, Michael Czaplik, Andreas Follmann, Carina B. Pereira DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/bmt-2024-0378
